data.title: DFI: Strong Earnings Momentum, Resilient Outlook and Strategic Growth Justify Buy Rating
data.description:
CGS International analyst Lim Siew Khee reiterated a Buy rating on DFI Retail Group Holdings today and set a price target of $5.50.

Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Lim Siew Khee has given his Buy rating due to a combination of factors, chiefly the company’s strong earnings momentum and management’s confident outlook. DFI’s underlying profit in 1Q26 appears to have surpassed both the analyst’s and market’s expectations, and the reaffirmed full‑year targets despite geopolitical and cost headwinds suggest that the business can absorb external shocks while maintaining growth and dividends.

The valuation case also underpins the positive stance, as the target price implies a premium multiple supported by visible earnings growth, solid execution across key segments, and a strengthened balance sheet after portfolio streamlining. Potential upside from disciplined acquisitions and accelerated store expansion further supports the Buy view, although the analyst notes that macroeconomic weakness and intensifying competition remain key risks to watch.

In another report released today, DBS also maintained a Buy rating on the stock with a $5.00 price target.
data.author: TipRanks Auto-Generated Intelligence Newsdesk
